VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.label: Militärmagier
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.description: Militärmagier originate from Anima Prime, a world teeming with psionic spellcasters but mired in brutal war. Advanced gunpowder weaponry and the ever-present threat of modern warfare decimated countless bloodlines of talented psycasters. The first Militärmagiers were formed from the experiences and lessons of those surviving spellcasters.\n\nMilitärmagier doesn't prioritize exceptional lethal cast or earth-shattering miracles, but continuously refines their fundamental spells to increase their efficiency and frequency. Combined with modern technology and military training to secure their own niche in modern warfare.
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.tooltip: The path of the Militärmagier seeks the ability to continuously survive and battle on the battlefield. They have no hesitation in using firearms because bullets cast faster than any lethal spell.
